case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. JOSE GABRIEL DZUL MIS

docket_entries.description: AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED SEP-06-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MIS, JOSE GABRIEL DZUL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIS, JOSE GABRIEL DZUL $1,530.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
